REMEMBER...
When it comes to SELLING your product, the absolute most important
thing you have to talk about and sell is the TRANSFORMATION... not
the way the product is delivered.
In other words, you’re selling the RESULT, not the DVDs or the ebook
or the home study course or the teleseminars

Update and the Ground Rules...
• Remember... our focus is your Seed Launch
• The community is rocking... this is your built-in support network - be
sure to use it
• Recordings and other goodies are being posted in the members area
• I’ll answer questions towards the end of the call
• I need you to participate - on the calls and between the calls
• Respect the ecosystem

It’s time to LAUNCH!
(And why you can do this)
• Your Seed Product is a “live” training... high perceived value
• Your Seed Product provides coaching... the easiest sale
• You have people on your list who have been waiting to buy from you
• You’ve got a proven formula
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 8 of 58 --

Before we get started...
• There are many ways to skin a cat...
• We’re talking about a sales process today, and there are rooms full of
books about sales and copywriting and sales videos...
• I’m going to show you a SIMPLE process... that’s been deadly effective
for the specific purpose of selling Seed Launches
• You’ll see my process wasn’t perfect... and your’s doesn’t need to be
perfect either
• If you’re experienced, feel free to change the process
• If you’re a beginner... this process is time-tested. Stick to it.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 11 of 58 --

1. The Shot Across The Bow
• The core piece to the Shot Across the Bow is that you’re asking for
interaction... and as part of the interaction you’re revealing that
you’ve got something coming
• I’ve got two models to show you...
• The “Classic”
• The “Call for Case Studies”
• There are many other possibilities, and I’ve used other variations...
but these two are simple and they work really well
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 12 of 58 --

Shot Across The Bow Checklist
• Friendly
• Establishes authority
• Arouses curiosity
• Seeks feedback
• Doesn’t sell
• People support that which
they help create...
www.getwsodownload.com

2. Prelaunch
• Not a full out PLF-style Prelaunch
• One piece of Prelaunch Content (PLC) is generally sufficient
• Keep it simple.
• This example uses a video, but you could do it via a blog post
or even an email. (The message is what’s important, not the
media.)
• If you’ve got advanced skills and you want to be more
elaborate, then feel free
• If you’re a beginner, stick to the program!
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 20 of 58 --

Prelaunch Checklist
• Establishes authority
• Provides value
• Paints a brighter future (shows possibility of transformation)
• Foreshadows offer
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 21 of 58 --

Prelaunch Triggers
• Authority
• Likeability
• Social Proof
• Scarcity
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 22 of 58 --

Launch List or Not?
• Optional: establishes Launch List
• If you haven’t launched before and your current list is closely in
alignment with Seed Launch offer, do NOT use a launch list.
• If the Seed Launch is a different type offer to why they joined your
list, then use a Launch List.
www.getwsodownload.com

• EXAMPLE: Fourth piece is product delivery
• EXAMPLE: Fifth piece is taking it forward
• REMEMBER: it’s about the transformation

Prelaunch Content - the Offer Preview
• The Offer Preview
• Focused (not a huge course, deep dive, specialized training)
• Rough deliverables (five calls, interactive, live questions, coaches)
• Who it’s for (high level or just starting out)
• Rough agenda (a very quick description of the calls, this is optional)
• Pricing foreshadow (not going to be inexpensive)

Prelaunch Content - the CTA
• The Call to Action (CTA)
• Opt-in form
• Sales Process foreshadow (not a fancy launch, join the list and I’ll
contact you)
• Scarcity (most spots are already filled)
• Instructions (go ahead and put your email address in)
• Reclose (seed launches are awesome, put in your email address)

-- 40 of 58 --

Your Sales Process
• The sales video or sales letter can be shorter than typical
• Keep it simple.
• This example uses a video, but you could do it via a standard sales
letter. (Although for most people, the video will actually be easier.)
• If you’ve got advanced skills and you want to be more elaborate,
then feel free
• If you’re a beginner, stick to the program!
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 41 of 58 --

The “Sale” Checklist
• Remember, you’re selling the transformation... not the stuff
• Authority
• Scarcity
• This is for you if...
• Strong presentation of price
• Risk Reversal
• Call to Action
• Be STRONG... before you create, think about all the lives you are
going to impact. Get clear on the value you are creating.
www.getwsodownload.com

• Transition to the Close (aww shucks...)
• This is obviously for you (assume the close)
• Scarcity
• Not PLF (answer objection, clarify offer)
• This is how it’s going to work (small group)

The Sale - the Close, part 1
• Presentation of price
• Small group and price anchoring ($17k to $32k)
• Present price with reason why
• Instructions (CTA)
www.getwsodownload.com

The Sale - the Close, part 1

The Sale - the Close, part 2
• Risk Reversal
• The guarantee (30 days or longer)
• Instructions (CTA)

The Sale - the Close, part 3
• Bonuses
• Focus on benefits and the transformation
• You could also put bonuses right after the

• Instructions (CTA)
• End with an assumption of the close

-- 54 of 58 --

4. The Emails
• In general, keep your emails short and sweet
• Always know the goal of each email, and make sure every word of the
email is written with that goal in mind
• I’m going to give you all the emails I used to launch this Seed Launch
Deep Dive training.You can use those emails as a model for your
emails.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 55 of 58 --

5. The Deadline
• You absolutely need a hard deadline for your launch... you have to
close down your sales process
• Half of your orders will come in on closing day
• You ABSOLUTELY need to send two emails on you closing day (if you
don’t do this you will lose approximately 25% of your sales)
• Make the deadline at midnight (in the U.S. use midnight EST or PST)
• Go get ‘em!!
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 56 of 58 --

Your Seed Launch
• This is NOT rocket science
• People get intimidated by the process of asking for the sale...
• This is simple - you’re offering massive value to your prospects, and
you’re giving them the opportunity to transform their lives
• Due to the Seed Launch process it’s almost physically impossible to
not deliver massive value
• When you offer mass value, people are happy to pay you
• Just follow the process I’ve taught you
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 57 of 58 --

Module Four Homework
• REMEMBER! This is about progress, not perfection!
• REMEMBER! None of this is set in stone... you can change
your mind at any time!
• Create an outline (a simple outline - just use bullet points)
of your sales video (or sales letter) and post it to the
community
• Participate in the community by giving feedback and
encouragement
www.getwsodownload.com
